message:
chore: update test fixtures, coverage baseline, config tests, and parse tests

Maintenance changes across tests, fixtures, and documentation:

- package_manager.rs: fix git source parse tests to match production
  behavior where the "git:" prefix is stripped before calling
  parse_git_source. Tests now pass raw paths, and traversal-detection
  assertions updated to expect "local" host for relative paths.

- config.rs: add two tests for extensionRisk config merging —
  merge_extension_risk_combines_global_and_project_values verifies
  project-level overrides win for alpha/windowSize/failClosed while
  global-only fields (ledgerLimit, decisionTimeoutMs) are preserved;
  merge_extension_risk_empty_project_object_keeps_global_values verifies
  an empty project extensionRisk doesn't clear global settings.

- conformance/fixture_runner.rs: use `..` rest pattern in Doctor command
  match to accommodate new --fix and --only fields without explicit listing.

- openai_responses_stream.json: add text_end events to all three stream
  test scenarios (simple, multi-delta, multi-content) to match the
  updated provider event model.

- coverage-baseline-map.json: update branch metric representation from
  null to 0.0 with "branch_fallback" status labels, reflecting the
  deterministic fallback strategy for environments where llvm-cov branch
  export crashes with SIGSEGV.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
